title: ceratocephalus pilosus
intro: Ceratocephalus pilosus, also known as woolly bear, is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis, and to soothe digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery. Traditional herbal preparations of Ceratocephalus pilosus include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
